zh.lifeSummary: 當John Sharpe於1500年出生在英國時，他的父親Christopher Sharpe20歲，母親Lousia Durham20歲。他和Elizabeth Payne至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1579年在英國林可爾史爾格爾享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾格爾。

nameMeanings.name: Sharpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sharp
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English sharp(e) ‘sharp, quick, smart, acute, keen-witted’ (Old English scearp).
Irish: when not the English or Scots name in 1 above, an Anglicized (part translated) form of Gaelic Ó Géaráin ‘descendant of Géarán’, a personal name based on a diminutive of géar ‘sharp’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Scharf   ‘sharp-cutting’ or of any of several other European names with similar meaning.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Sharpe was born in 1500, in England, his father, Christopher Sharpe, was 20 and his mother, Lousia Durham, was 20. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Elizabeth Payne. He died about 1579, in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Sharpe est né en 1500, à Angleterre, son père, Christopher Sharpe, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lousia Durham, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Elizabeth Payne. Il est décédé environ 1579, à Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Sharpe 1500 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher Sharpe 20 und seine Mutter Lousia Durham 20. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Payne mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1579 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Sharpe è nato il nel 1500 nel England, il suo padre, Christopher Sharpe, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lousia Durham, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Elizabeth Payne. Morì circa 1579, nel Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Sharpeが1500年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Christopher Sharpeは20歳，母Lousia Durhamは20歳であった。彼はElizabeth Payneとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1579年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアゴクスヒルで80歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアゴクスヒルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Sharpe(이)가 1500년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher Sharpe(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lousia Durham(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Payne(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1579년 영국 링코실르 고스힐에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 고스힐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Sharpe nasceu em 1500, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher Sharpe, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lousia Durham, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Elizabeth Payne. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1579, em Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Sharpe родился в 1500 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Christopher Sharpe было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lousia Durham, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Elizabeth Payne. Он умер около 1579 г. в местности гоксхилл, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности гоксхилл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
